summary: A compilation of Fox News television coverage about self-deportation incentives (Laura Ingraham, correspondent Madeleine Rivera, Kristi Noem, and a Stephen Miller tweet quote-card on a 'TRUMP ADMIN RAMPS UP END-OF-YEAR DEPORTATION PUSH' chyron) promoting the CBP Home App $3,000 exit bonus. It is captured cable-news content, not a stylized or music-driven produced agency piece.
notable_text: TRUMP ADMIN RAMPS UP END-OF-YEAR DEPORTATION PUSH
Each self-deportation saves taxpayers up to a million dollars
